action: Periodically check the status of each video generation using the API for all saved conv_ids and update the script/video record to 'success' if video is generated successfully.
fallback_action: Notify user with an error message if status check or update fails.

recipe.steps: Retrieve all conv_ids with status 'pending' from memory using the data retrieval tool.

For each conv_id, send a GET request to https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} to check the video status. If the API indicates success, update the corresponding script/video record in memory to set status to 'success'.
recipe.generalized_functions:
import requests

def check_video_status_and_update(conv_id, update_func):
    """
    Checks the video generation status using the API and calls update_func to mark 'success' if video is ready.
    Parameters:
        conv_id (str): The conversation ID for the generated video.
        update_func (callable): Function to update the status in memory.
    Returns:
        status (str): The new status, 'success' or previous status if not updated.
    """
    url = f'https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{conv_id}'
    response = requests.get(url)
    data = response.json()
    status = data.get('status')
    if status == 'success':
        update_func(conv_id, 'success')
    return status

recipe.steps: Save any updated status information for conv_ids to memory using the data save tool.

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Periodically check the status of generated videos for all conv_ids and update them as successful when ready.
